# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on Keep a Changelog (opens new window) and this project adheres to Semantic Versioning (opens new window).

# v1.0.0 - 2022-01-02

# Commits

  • Tests e2f59ad (opens new window)
  • Initial commit dc222aa (opens new window)
  • [meta] do not publish workflow files 5ef77f7 (opens new window)
  • npm init 992b068 (opens new window)
  • read me 6c9afa9 (opens new window)
  • Initial implementation 2f98925 (opens new window)
  • [meta] add auto-changelog 6c476ae (opens new window)

  • Only apps should have lockfiles ab318ed (opens new window)
  • [meta] add safe-publish-latest 2bb23b3 (opens new window)
  • [meta] add sideEffects flag 600223b (opens new window)
